## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and implementation scope.

## Test evidence

- [ ] New or changed behavior has automated coverage in this PR.
- [ ] Relevant unit and API integration tests pass.
- [ ] Playwright covers critical browser or JavaScript behavior, when applicable.
- [ ] CI Tests, CI Integrity Gates, Browser E2E, and Deploy Readiness pass on the current head SHA.
- [ ] No failing test was deleted, skipped, or weakened merely to make CI green.
- [ ] Failure artifacts and logs were reviewed when a check failed.

## Risk and rollout

Describe migrations, secrets, monitoring, rollback, accessibility, and known limitations. Use “Not applicable” with a reason where appropriate.
